setup: WorldSize: 10, Pred(ID:1, pos:5, en:10), Prey(ID:2, pos:6, en:10), HungerLoss: 1, EatingGain: 5
expect: Predator moves to 6, eats Prey 2, energy becomes 10-1+5=14. Prey 2 is removed. Status: FINISHED (Extinction).

setup: WorldSize: 10, Pred(ID:1, pos:2, en:10), Prey(ID:2, pos:1, en:10), Prey(ID:3, pos:3, en:10), HungerLoss: 1
expect: Predator is equidistant to Prey 2 and 3. Moves toward lower index (pos 1).

setup: WorldSize: 10, Pred(ID:1, pos:0, en:10), Prey(ID:2, pos:0, en:10), HungerLoss: 1
expect: Prey 2 is on same cell as Pred 1. Prey 2 moves toward index 0, but is already at 0, so stays at 0.
